lines.speaker: Lundail
lines.text: Hello there. How can I help you, brave adventurer?

lines.speaker: Lundail
lines.text: I sell rune stones. I've got some good stuff, some really powerful little rocks. Take a look.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's that big old building above us?

lines.speaker: Lundail
lines.text: That, my friend, is the mage battle arena. Top mages come from all over Gielinor to compete in the arena.

lines.speaker: Lundail
lines.text: Few return, most get fried, hence the smell.

lines.speaker: Lundail
lines.text: You'll need to have completed the Easy Wilderness Achievement Diary to qualify for free runes.

lines.speaker: Lundail
lines.text: You need more free space before you can claim your free runes.

lines.speaker: Lundail
lines.text: There you go. Come back tomorrow for some more!

lines.speaker: Lundail
lines.text: You've already claimed your free runes today. Come back tomorrow for some more.
